title: funimation 101 dvd features
wikitext:
[]: funimation 1.01 dvd features             Quote Post by peterw5 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 6:36 am Hey. Does anybody know what the special features on the funimation 1.01 dvd are going to be? I've looked but haven't found anything anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:05 am An English dub.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:10 am trailers

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:11 am Scene selection.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:17 am maybe TV ads Main Menu

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:18 am Maybe some great commentary .

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:44 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Maybe some great commentary .

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:53 am English dub and the original Japanese dub with English subtitles. Perhaps interviews and commentary? I hope some behind the scenes and outtakes! I am mostly hoping to see outtakes. I would love to see outtakes. Outtakes would be awesome to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Nov 03, 2009 4:33 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Maybe some total and shameful bullshit .

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Tue Nov 03, 2009 5:00 pm I doubt we'll get it, but I think some kind of interview segments with some of the English voice actors might be interesting. I don't know if anyone at this forum checked out the DVD's for the second (Comet Empire) season of Star Blazers when they came out a few years back, but as part of the extras they had two of the voice actors go on camera together and discuss their memories of dubbing the series in a sort of informal conversation format. IIRC the first set was comprised of the actors who played Derek Wildstar and Leader Desslok, while for the second interview they teamed up the actors who played Mark Venture and Nova. If Funi were willing to try something similar with the English dub voice actors from Rebuild, it might provide a fun, lighthearted extra versus the usual audio commentary where nobody seems all that interested in discussing what's actually happening on screen. Just my two cents...

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Nov 03, 2009 5:20 pm Funi dvd's suck when they come to extars and it will be no shock if the DVD extars are trailers for stuff like The Dragon Box one, and Tsubasa Season 1.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 5:55 pm I hope there's an extra where Goku talks about how he could totally kick Shinji's ass in a fight.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 03, 2009 6:00 pm Unrated version Deleted scenes Blooper reel Alternate ending Interview with creator Matt Greenfield "Angel of Doom" Sing-Along Complete text of the Kabbalah Zuggy was also supposed to contribute a bunch of special features, but he got into a fight with Funimation and scratched up the portions of all the discs that contained his material.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 6:07 pm NAveryW wrote: Interview with creator Matt Greenfield

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:44 pm nah, they'll save all of the goodies for 1.11

[]:             Quote Post by Captain Button » Thu Nov 05, 2009 8:03 pm I posted about this over in the Evangelion 1.01 R1 DVD Details [NO SPOILERS] thread. Short answer: No special features other than trailers.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Nov 05, 2009 9:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I hope there's an extra where Goku talks about how he could totally kick Shinji's ass in a fight.
